# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up environment
        run: |
          # Add commands to set up your build environment if needed
          echo "Setting up environment..."

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          # Add commands to build your application
          echo "Building application..."
          # Example: make build

      - name: Compile binaries
        run: |
          # Add commands to compile binaries
          echo "Compiling binaries..."
          # Example: make compile

      - name: Create build artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts
          cp path/to/binaries/* artifacts/
          cp path/to/configs/* artifacts/
          cp path/to/scripts/* artifacts/

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: artifacts/**

      - name: Notify team
        run: |
          echo "Build artifacts are available for download."
          # Optionally, add commands to notify team members (e.g., send a message to a Slack channel)
